## Summary

Explain the creator problem and the focused change.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Geometry or storage changes include tests.
- [ ] Visible controls work with a keyboard.
- [ ] Responsive layouts were checked.
- [ ] New rule or fee claims link to current official documentation and include a verification date.

## Trust boundaries

- [ ] This adds no analytics, tracking, credential handling, remote assets, or silent requests.
- [ ] It does not promise Marketplace acceptance, originality, sales, or profit.
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots contain no personal data, private concepts, local paths, credentials, or copied assets.
- [ ] Untrusted files and geometry controls remain bounded and validated.

## Visual changes

Add screenshots using synthetic concepts, or write `Not applicable`.

## Limitations

Describe remaining geometry, browser, Studio, policy, or accessibility limitations.
